about.heading: We engineer software that powers your growth
about.p1: DevFactors is a software engineering consultancy founded by Anish Abid, a Senior Software Engineer with 8+ years of experience building scalable web applications and leading engineering teams.
about.p2: We specialize in modern JavaScript/TypeScript ecosystems - React, Next.js, Node.js, NestJS, and MongoDB - delivering end-to-end solutions for startups and enterprises.

items.name: Sarah Chen
items.quote: Anish completely transformed our monolithic backend into a scalable microservices architecture. The migration was seamless, and our deployment frequency went from weekly to multiple times per day.

items.name: Marcus Rivera
items.quote: Working with DevFactors was the best decision we made for our platform. The team delivered ahead of schedule, and the code quality was exceptional.

items.name: Emily Zhang
items.quote: Anish led our frontend team through a complete migration from Angular to React. His technical leadership and mentoring elevated the entire team.

items.name: James Walker
items.quote: The dashboard Anish built for our AI analytics platform is incredible. It handles millions of data points in real-time with zero lag.

engagementModels.title: Project-Based
engagementModels.desc: Fixed scope and timeline. Best for well-defined projects with clear requirements.
features: Fixed-price contract
Defined deliverables
Milestone-based payments

engagementModels.title: Dedicated Team
engagementModels.desc: Full engineering team working exclusively on your product. Monthly retainer model.
features: Dedicated engineers
Full Scrum/Agile
Flexible scaling

engagementModels.title: Staff Augmentation

features: Instant onboarding
Your tools & processes
Hourly or monthly billing

faq.q: How long does a typical project take?
faq.a: Project timelines vary based on scope and complexity. A typical web application MVP can be delivered in 6-8 weeks, while larger enterprise solutions may take 3-6 months. We provide a detailed timeline estimate during the discovery phase.

faq.q: How do you ensure project quality?
faq.a: We follow rigorous QA processes including automated testing, code reviews, continuous integration, and user acceptance testing. Every project includes a dedicated QA engineer and weekly progress reviews.

faq.q: What communication tools do you use?
faq.a: We use modern collaboration tools including Slack for daily communication, Jira/Linear for project management, Notion for documentation, and Google Meet/Zoom for regular standups and reviews.

faq.q: Can I scale the team up or down?
faq.a: Yes. Our engagement models are designed for flexibility. You can scale your team up or down with 2 weeks notice for dedicated teams, and monthly adjustments for staff augmentation.

faq.q: What if I'm not satisfied with the work?
faq.a: We offer a satisfaction guarantee. We work iteratively with regular demos and checkpoints to ensure alignment. If something isn't right, we fix it at no additional cost during the active sprint.

items.longDesc: We build high-performance web and mobile applications tailored to your business needs. From responsive React SPAs to cross-platform mobile apps with React Native, our team delivers pixel-perfect experiences that users love. We focus on performance, accessibility, and maintainability from day one.
features: Responsive single-page and multi-page web applications
Cross-platform mobile apps with React Native & Flutter
Progressive Web Apps (PWAs) with offline support
Server-side rendering for optimal SEO and performance
Real-time features with WebSockets and Server-Sent Events
Payment gateway integration (Stripe, PayPal, Square)
User authentication and authorization systems
Performance optimization and Core Web Vitals tuning

items.longDesc: Design, migrate, and optimize your cloud infrastructure for maximum performance and cost efficiency. We architect scalable systems on AWS, Azure, and GCP that grow with your business. Our cloud solutions reduce operational overhead while improving reliability and security posture.
features: Cloud migration strategy and execution (lift-and-shift to full re-architecture)
Infrastructure as Code with Terraform, Pulumi, and CloudFormation
Auto-scaling and load balancing for high-traffic applications
Cost optimization and FinOps practices to reduce cloud spend
Disaster recovery and business continuity planning
Containerization with Docker and Kubernetes orchestration
Serverless architecture with Lambda, Functions, and Fargate
Cloud security hardening and compliance (SOC 2, HIPAA, GDPR)

items.longDesc: Build robust, secure, and well-documented APIs that power your applications and services. Whether RESTful or GraphQL, we design APIs with developer experience as a first-class concern. Our APIs are built to scale from day one, with comprehensive documentation, versioning strategies, and automated testing.
features: RESTful API design following best practices and standards
GraphQL APIs with Apollo, Relay, and code-first approaches
API versioning and lifecycle management strategies
Comprehensive API documentation with OpenAPI/Swagger
Authentication and authorization (JWT, OAuth2, API keys)
Rate limiting, throttling, and request validation
Automated API testing with Postman, Jest, and Supertest
WebSocket and real-time communication protocols

process.title: Specification
process.desc: We define the API contract with OpenAPI or GraphQL schema first.

process.title: Prototyping
process.desc: We build a working prototype for early feedback and iteration.

process.title: Development
process.desc: We implement the API with comprehensive error handling and logging.

process.title: Documentation
process.desc: We generate interactive documentation with examples and guides.

process.title: Testing
process.desc: Automated integration, load, and security testing of all endpoints.

process.title: Deployment
process.desc: CI/CD pipeline setup with canary deployments and rollback capability.

items.longDesc: Create stunning, responsive user interfaces that delight your users and drive engagement. Animation and micro-interactions with Framer Motion and GSAP

Performance optimization with Lighthouse scores of 90+
